ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the model belongs to */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team working on the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the model was last updated */,
  "serialized_size" REAL /* Serialized size of the model in bytes */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., regression, classification) */,
  "framework" TEXT /* Machine learning framework used (e.g., TensorFlow, PyTorch) */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used (e.g., Random Forest, SVM) */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* JSON string of hyperparameters used for training */,
  "training_time" REAL /* Time taken to train the model */,
  "training_data_size" REAL /* Size of the training dataset in bytes */,
  "validation_data_size" REAL /* Size of the validation dataset in bytes */,
  "test_data_size" REAL /* Size of the test dataset in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the project was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed, on hold) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "leader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project leader */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_leader_id FOREIGN KEY ("leader_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the team was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the team was last updated */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the team belongs to (e.g., AI, Data Science) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being evaluated */,
  "evaluation_time" REAL /* CPU time taken for evaluation (in seconds) */,
  "model_cost" REAL /* RAM usage during evaluation (in RAM-Hours) */,
  "classified_instances" INTEGER /* Number of instances classified */,
  "classification_accuracy" REAL /* Percentage of correctly classified instances */,
  "kappa_statistic" REAL /* Kappa Statistic percentage */,
  "kappa_temporal_statistic" REAL /* Kappa Temporal Statistic percentage */,
  "kappa_m_statistic" REAL /* Kappa M Statistic percentage */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 Score percentage */,
  "f1_score_class_0" REAL /* F1 Score for class 0 percentage */,
  "f1_score_class_1" REAL /* F1 Score for class 1 percentage */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision percentage */,
  "precision_class_0" REAL /* Precision for class 0 percentage */,
  "precision_class_1" REAL /* Precision for class 1 percentage */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall percentage */,
  "recall_class_0" REAL /* Recall for class 0 percentage */,
  "recall_class_1" REAL /* Recall for class 1 percentage */,
  "training_instances" INTEGER /* Number of instances used for model training */,
  "evaluation_type" TEXT /* Type of evaluation (e.g., training, validation, test) */,
  "evaluation_data_size" REAL /* Size of the dataset used for evaluation in bytes */,
  "evaluation_data_source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset used for evaluation */,
  "evaluation_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the evaluation */,
  "confusion_matrix" TEXT /* JSON string of the confusion matrix */,
  "roc_auc_score" REAL /* ROC AUC score */,
  "mean_squared_error" REAL /* Mean squared error (for regression tasks) */,
  "mean_absolute_error" REAL /* Mean absolute error (for regression tasks) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data scientist, admin) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created this user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the model */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the model */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the model */,
  "access_duration" REAL /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  "access_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was last updated */,
  "serialized_size" REAL /* Serialized size of the model in bytes */,
  "version_type" TEXT /* Type of the version (e.g., major, minor, patch) */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, released, deprecated) */,
  "release_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the version release */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* JSON string of changes made in this version */,
  "version_data_size" REAL /* Size of the versioned model in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
